user_intent.intent_text: 验证链路利用率监控功能。选择 h1 到 h3 通信路径上的任意一条链路作为监控对象，使用程序已有的 probe 探测包从 h1 发送到 h3，配合持续流量至少 20 个包来触发可观测的链路利用率变化。只需要一个正向场景，成功标准是 probe 回包或监控结果中能看到该链路的利用率数值大于 0。
user_intent.topology_mapping: 关注 h1 到 h3 的通信路径，监控对象为该路径上的任意一条链路。
user_intent.observation_target: h1 到 h3 路径上一条被监控链路的利用率
user_intent.observation_method: 使用程序已有的 probe 探测包，并以 probe 回包或监控结果作为观测依据。
user_intent.expected_observation: 在持续业务流量驱动后，观测到的链路利用率数值应大于 0。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送至少 20 个包的持续流量，再发送 probe 相关探测包。

target_task.task_description: 验证链路利用率监控功能。选择 h1 到 h3 通信路径上的任意一条链路作为监控对象，使用程序已有的 probe 探测包从 h1 发送到 h3，配合持续流量至少 20 个包来触发可观测的链路利用率变化。只需要一个正向场景，成功标准是 probe 回包或监控结果中能看到该链路的利用率数值大于 0。
target_task.observation_focus: one monitored switch-to-switch link on the h1->h3 path
target_task.expected_observation_semantics: the returned probe observation should report utilization greater than zero after sustained traffic

observation_requirements.purpose: verify the probe response exposes a non-zero utilization value after traffic

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: drive sustained traffic and then issue a probe-based query for link utilization
sequence_contract.expected_observation: probe response includes utilization data greater than zero

user_intent.intent_text: 验证 heavy hitter 检测功能。可以在测试前由人工把交换机的阈值临时调低到 10。然后让 h1 向 h2 发送同一条五元组 TCP 流，期望前 10 个包可以转发，第 11 个及之后的包被丢弃；另外再生成一个不同五元组的新 TCP 流，期望它不受前一条流影响。
user_intent.topology_mapping: 测试 h1 到 h2 的 TCP 流量行为，并比较同一五元组与不同五元组的差异。
user_intent.operator_constraints: 测试前允许人工将阈值临时调低到 10。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送一条重复五元组 TCP 流，再发送一条不同五元组的新 TCP 流。

target_task.task_description: 验证 heavy hitter 检测功能。可以在测试前由人工把交换机的阈值临时调低到 10。然后让 h1 向 h2 发送同一条五元组 TCP 流，期望前 10 个包可以转发，第 11 个及之后的包被丢弃；另外再生成一个不同五元组的新 TCP 流，期望它不受前一条流影响。

operator_actions.expected_effect: threshold is lowered to 10 before traffic begins

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: send a repeated TCP flow below the heavy-hitter threshold and observe forwarding
continue the same TCP flow beyond the threshold and expect drop behavior
send a different TCP flow and verify it is not affected by the previous heavy hitter

user_intent.intent_text: 拓扑：h1和h2是内部网络，其他是外部网络；测试的功能：允许内部主机主动向外部主机发起通信， 内部主机主动向外部主机发起的通信允许执行，相反不行。主要是检测这个功能是否实现。检查策略：生成两组时序数据包序列，1. 内部主机主动向外部主机发起通信，此时应该是成功的2. 外部主机主动向内部主机发起通信，此时应该是失败的

target_task.task_description: 测试有状态防火墙功能：允许内部主机(h1,h2)主动发起与外部主机的通信并允许返回流量，但阻止外部主机主动发起与内部主机的通信。生成两组时序数据包序列验证此功能实现。
target_task.feature_under_test: stateful firewall: allow internal->external initiated flows, drop external->internal initiated flows

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 验证内部主机主动发起与外部主机的通信被允许，且返回流量也被允许通过（有状态连接建立成功）
验证外部主机主动发起与内部主机的通信被阻止（无状态连接，外部发起的SYN应被丢弃）

target_task.expected_observation_semantics: 同一五元组流的前10个包成功转发，第11个及之后被丢弃；不同五元组的新流独立计数，不受前一流影响

operator_actions.expected_effect: 将heavy hitter检测阈值从默认值降低到10，使得测试流量能够触发阈值限制

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 验证同一五元组TCP流在超过阈值后被丢弃
sequence_contract.expected_observation: 前10个包被转发，第11个及之后被丢弃

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 验证不同五元组的新TCP流不受前一流影响，可以正常转发
sequence_contract.expected_observation: 新五元组的包被正常转发，不受之前流的状态影响

target_task.task_description: 验证拥塞感知负载均衡功能：h1到h5的多条TCP流应分散到不同路径；当某条路径拥塞时，后续流量应切换到其他路径

sequence_contract.expected_observation: 不同TCP流(不同srcPort)应通过不同路径到达h5，可通过观察各路径的telemetry或register状态验证

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 验证当某条路径拥塞时，后续流量会切换到其他路径
sequence_contract.expected_observation: 拥塞反馈后，后续流的hash种子应被更新，导致路径选择改变；feedback_ts寄存器应记录新的时间戳

user_intent.intent_text: 验证有状态防火墙功能。h1 和 h2 是内部主机，其他是外部主机。要求内部主机主动向外部主机发起连接时允许通信，外部主机主动发起到内部时不允许。

target_task.task_description: 验证有状态防火墙：内部主机(h1、h2)主动向外部主机发起TCP连接时应允许通信；外部主机主动向内部主机发起TCP连接时应被拒绝。程序使用Bloom filter寄存器记录内部发起的TCP流状态。

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 证明内部主机主动发起的TCP流量可建立状态，并允许外部方向的返回流量通过。
sequence_contract.expected_observation: 内部到外部的初始TCP SYN被允许；在该流状态建立后，匹配同一5元组反向方向的返回TCP报文被允许。

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 证明外部主机未经过内部先发起建状态时，主动访问内部主机的TCP流量被拒绝。
sequence_contract.expected_observation: 外部到内部的初始TCP报文因未命中已建立状态而被丢弃。

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 证明内部主机主动发起TCP连接时可建立状态，并允许外部方向的对应返回流量。

sequence_contract.expected_observation: 外部到内部的初始发起报文因不存在已建立状态而被拒绝。

target_task.task_description: Validate stateful firewall behavior for internal-to-external and external-to-internal TCP connections.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Validate that an internal client (h1) initiates a TCP connection to an external server (h3), allowing the full three-way handshake (SYN → SYN-ACK → ACK).

sequence_contract.expected_observation: The TCP SYN packet from h3 to h1 is dropped, with no response or state creation in the switch stateful memory.

user_intent.intent_text: 验证有状态防火墙功能。h1 和 h2 是内部主机，其他是外部主机。要求内部主机主动向外部主机发起连接时允许通信，外部主机主动发起到内部时不允许。
user_intent.topology_zone_mapping: h1 和 h2 是 internal，h3 是 external。
user_intent.role_policy: 仅允许 internal 主动向 external 发起 TCP 连接；external 只能回复已建立连接，不能主动发起。

target_task.task_description: Validate stateful firewall behavior for TCP traffic: internal hosts may initiate connections to external hosts, while external hosts may not initiate new connections to internal hosts.
target_task.expected_observation_semantics: The program uses stateful memory (Bloom-filter-backed registers) to remember internal-initiated TCP flows. Internal SYN traffic should create state that permits matching reverse traffic, while unsolicited external initiation should be denied without creating new state.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Prove that a TCP connection initiated by an internal host to an external host is allowed and that reverse-direction reply traffic is permitted after state is created.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: The outbound TCP SYN from the internal host is forwarded, return TCP SYN-ACK from the external host is allowed, the final ACK is forwarded, and stateful memory is updated to permit the reverse flow.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Prove that an external host cannot initiate a new TCP connection to an internal host.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: The external-to-internal TCP SYN is dropped, no reverse SYN-ACK is forwarded, and no new allow-state is created for that attempted flow.

target_task.expected_observation_semantics: Program evidence shows stateful behavior via two bloom-filter registers. Internal TCP SYN traffic seeds bloom-filter state; external-to-internal TCP packets are only allowed when the reverse flow hashes match previously written entries. Therefore, internal-initiated TCP should pass bidirectionally after state establishment, while externally initiated new TCP SYN should be dropped.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Prove that a TCP connection initiated by an internal host is permitted and that reply traffic from the external host is allowed after internal SYN state is established.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: The internal SYN is forwarded, the external SYN-ACK is forwarded because prior internal state exists, and the final ACK is forwarded.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Prove that an external host cannot initiate a new TCP connection to an internal host when no prior internal SYN-established state exists.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: The external SYN is dropped and no permitted reverse-flow state is available for that new connection attempt.

user_intent.intent_text: 验证链路利用率监控功能。选择 h1 到 h3 通信路径上的任意一条链路作为监控对象，使用程序已有的 probe 探测包从 h1 发送到 h3，配合持续流量至少 20 个包来触发可观测的链路利用率变化。只需要一个正向场景，成功标准是 probe 回包或监控结果中能看到该链路的利用率数值大于 0。

user_intent.observation_target: h1 到 h3 路径上一条被监控链路的利用率
user_intent.observation_method: 使用程序已有的 probe 探测包，并以 probe 回包或监控结果作为观测依据。
user_intent.expected_observation: 在持续业务流量驱动后，观测到的链路利用率数值应大于 0。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送至少 20 个包的持续流量，再发送 probe 相关探测包。

user_intent.intent_text: 验证 heavy hitter 检测功能。可以在测试前由人工把交换机的阈值临时调低到 10。然后让 h1 向 h2 发送同一条五元组 TCP 流，期望前 10 个包可以转发，第 11 个及之后的包被丢弃；另外再生成一个不同五元组的新 TCP 流，期望它不受前一条流影响。
user_intent.topology_mapping: 测试 h1 到 h2 的 TCP 流量行为，并比较同一五元组与不同五元组的差异。

target_task.task_description: Validate heavy hitter detection behavior: verify that packets beyond the first 10 of a TCP flow are dropped after threshold is manually lowered to 10, and that a new TCP flow with different 5-tuple is unaffected.
target_task.expected_observation_semantics: first_n_delivered_then_dropped

operator_actions.expected_effect: Threshold lowered to 10 so that packet 11+ of same 5-tuple triggers drop.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Demonstrate that heavy hitter detection triggers packet drop after threshold (10) is exceeded for a single TCP flow.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: First 10 packets delivered; packets 11+ of the same 5-tuple flow are dropped.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Verify that a new TCP flow with different 5-tuple is not affected by prior heavy hitter state.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: All packets of the new flow are delivered normally.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: 验证拥塞发生后流量切换到其他可用路径
sequence_contract.expected_observation: 在人为触发某条路径拥塞（如限速或丢包）后，新发起的TCP流不再经过该路径，而转向其他路径，且原拥塞路径流量下降、其他路径流量上升

user_intent.intent_text: 验证 heavy hitter 检测功能。可以在测试前由人工把交换机的阈值临时调低到 10。然后让 h1 向 h2 发送同一条五元组 TCP 流，期望前 10 个包可以转发，第 11 个及之后的包被丢弃；另外再生成一个不同五元组的新 TCP 流，期望它不受前一条流影响。
user_intent.topology_mapping: 测试 h1 到 h2 的 TCP 流量行为，并比较同一五元组与不同五元组的差异。
user_intent.operator_constraints: 测试前允许人工将阈值临时调低到 10。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送一条重复五元组 TCP 流，再发送一条不同五元组的新 TCP 流。

target_task.task_description: Validate heavy hitter detection behavior: verify that packets beyond the first 10 of a repeated 5-tuple TCP flow are dropped, while a new distinct 5-tuple TCP flow is unaffected.
target_task.expected_observation_semantics: first_n_delivered_then_dropped

operator_actions.expected_effect: Switch begins dropping packets after the 10th packet of any repeated 5-tuple flow.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Demonstrate that after 10 packets of the same 5-tuple TCP flow, subsequent packets are dropped.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: First 10 packets delivered; packet #11 and beyond dropped.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Verify that a new TCP flow with different 5-tuple is not affected by prior heavy hitter state.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: All packets of the new flow are delivered.

user_intent.intent_text: 验证链路利用率监控功能。选择 h1 到 h3 通信路径上的任意一条链路作为监控对象，使用程序已有的 probe 探测包从 h1 发送到 h3，配合持续流量至少 20 个包来触发可观测的链路利用率变化。只需要一个正向场景，成功标准是 probe 回包或监控结果中能看到该链路的利用率数值大于 0。

user_intent.observation_target: h1 到 h3 路径上一条被监控链路的利用率
user_intent.observation_method: 使用程序已有的 probe 探测包，并以 probe 回包或监控结果作为观测依据。
user_intent.expected_observation: 在持续业务流量驱动后，观测到的链路利用率数值应大于 0。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送至少 20 个包的持续流量，再发送 probe 相关探测包。

user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送一条重复五元组 TCP 流，再发送一条不同五元组的新 TCP 流。

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Confirm that a new TCP flow with different 5-tuple is not affected by prior heavy hitter state.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: All packets of the new flow are delivered.

user_intent.intent_text: 验证 heavy hitter 检测功能。可以在测试前由人工把交换机的阈值临时调低到 10。然后让 h1 向 h2 发送同一条五元组 TCP 流，期望前 10 个包可以转发，第 11 个及之后的包被丢弃；另外再生成一个不同五元组的新 TCP 流，期望它不受前一条流影响。
user_intent.topology_mapping: 测试 h1 到 h2 的 TCP 流量行为，并比较同一五元组与不同五元组的差异。
user_intent.operator_constraints: 测试前允许人工将阈值临时调低到 10。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送一条重复五元组 TCP 流，再发送一条不同五元组的新 TCP 流。

target_task.task_description: Validate heavy hitter detection functionality: verify that packets from the same TCP 5-tuple flow are forwarded for first 10 packets and dropped thereafter, while a distinct 5-tuple flow remains unaffected.
target_task.expected_observation_semantics: First 10 packets of identical 5-tuple delivered; 11th+ dropped. Distinct 5-tuple always delivered.

operator_actions.expected_effect: Switch will count packets per 5-tuple and drop after 10th packet.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Demonstrate heavy hitter detection by sending repeated packets of the same TCP 5-tuple; expect first 10 forwarded, subsequent dropped.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: Packets 1–10 delivered; packet 11+ dropped.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Verify isolation: a distinct TCP 5-tuple flow is unaffected by prior heavy hitter state.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: All packets delivered.

user_intent.intent_text: 验证有状态防火墙功能。h1 和 h2 是内部主机，其他是外部主机。要求内部主机主动向外部主机发起连接时允许通信，外部主机主动发起到内部时不允许。
user_intent.topology_zone_mapping: h1 和 h2 是 internal，h3 是 external。
user_intent.role_policy: 仅允许 internal 主动向 external 发起 TCP 连接；external 只能回复已建立连接，不能主动发起。

target_task.task_description: Validate stateful firewall behavior for internal-to-external and external-to-internal TCP connections

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Verify that an internal client (h1) can successfully establish a TCP connection to an external server (h3), with full three-way handshake completed and connection state established in switch stateful memory.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: TCP SYN from h1 to h3 is delivered; TCP SYN-ACK from h3 to h1 is delivered; TCP ACK from h1 to h3 is delivered; connection state is established in switch stateful memory.

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: Verify that an external server (h3) cannot initiate a TCP connection to an internal client (h1); the TCP SYN must be dropped and no connection state created.
sequence_contract.expected_observation: TCP SYN from h3 to h1 is dropped; no SYN-ACK is generated or forwarded; no connection state is created in switch stateful memory.
